message:
test(term): add 21 unit tests for terminal types (ClipboardSelection, Progress, Alert, TerminalSize)

Add comprehensive test module to terminal.rs which previously had zero tests:
- ClipboardSelection: equality, debug, clone (3 tests)
- Progress: default, equality across variants, clone, debug (4 tests)
- Alert: Bell, ToastNotification, variants inequality, SetUserVar, Progress, WindowTitleChanged, IconTitleChanged, TabTitleChanged (8 tests)
- TerminalSize: default values, equality, inequality, clone/copy, debug (5 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
